subcodes.title: Words to some Baha'is, spoken on 1912-08-26
subcodes.first_line: This visit is a proof of faithfulness, proof that we have not forgotten one another. In the world of existence nothing is greater than faithfulness
subcodes.first_line_orig: این ملاقات دلیل بر وفاست که همدیگر را فراموش ننمودیم در عالم وجود امری اعظم از وفا نیست که طول مدت سبب فراموشی و خلال
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @love as fundamental; spiritual foundations of religion
